nlq: How many customers are there?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers

nlq: How many customers are from Germany?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE country = 'Germany'

nlq: What are the names of all customers?
sql: SELECT name FROM customers

nlq: List all distinct countries that customers are from
sql: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM customers ORDER BY country

nlq: How many orders have been placed in total?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders

nlq: What is the total revenue from all orders?
sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders

nlq: What is the average order value?
sql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders

nlq: What is the highest order value?
sql: SELECT MAX(total_amount) FROM orders

nlq: What is the lowest order value?
sql: SELECT MIN(total_amount) FROM orders

nlq: How many orders are in 'completed' status?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

nlq: How many orders are in 'pending' status?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'

nlq: How many products are there?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products

nlq: What is the average product price?
sql: SELECT AVG(price) FROM products

nlq: How many products are in the 'Electronics' category?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics'

nlq: What is the total revenue per country?
sql: SELECT c.country, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nlq: How many orders did each customer place?
sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC

nlq: Which customers have placed more than 2 orders?
sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) > 2

nlq: What is the total quantity sold per product?
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_qty DESC

nlq: What is the revenue per product category?
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC

nlq: How many unique products were ordered?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) FROM order_items

nlq: Which orders contain more than 3 items?
sql: SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_items FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id HAVING SUM(quantity) > 3

nlq: What is the total revenue from completed orders?
sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

nlq: What is the total amount spent by each customer?
sql: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY total_spent DESC

nlq: How many orders were placed in 2024?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE YEAR(order_date) = 2024

nlq: What is the most expensive product in each category?
sql: SELECT category, name, price FROM products p1 WHERE price = (SELECT MAX(price) FROM products p2 WHERE p2.category = p1.category) ORDER BY category
